name: Blues 101
description: 6 foundational blues and early jazz numbers, all public domain. Perfect for learning the 12-bar form and dominant 7th voicings.

songs.title: Frankie and Johnny
songs.lyrics:
[C]Frankie and Johnny were [E7]lovers,
[F]Oh, lordy, how they could [C]love.
[C]They swore to be true to each [E7]other,
[F]True as the stars a[C]bove.
He was her [G7]man, but he done her [C]wrong.

[C]Frankie went down to the [E7]corner,
[F]Just for a bucket of [C]beer.
[C]She said, "Mister bartender,
[E7]Has my loving Johnny been [F]here?
He is my [G7]man, but he's doing me [C]wrong."

songs.title: Stagger Lee
songs.lyrics:
It was [G]back in '32 when times were [C]hard,
[G]Had a sawed-off shotgun and a [D7]crooked deck of cards.
Wore a [G]Stetson hat and a [C]black suit coat,
And a [G]chain made of [D7]gold around his [G]throat.

[G]Stagger Lee, Stagger Lee, what a [C]bad bad man,
[G]Stagger Lee was a friend of [D7]mine.
[G]Shot poor Billy DeLyon for a [C]Stetson hat,
[G]Now Billy [D7]ain't gonna [G]be back.

songs.title: Careless Love
songs.lyrics:
[G]Love, oh love, oh [G7]careless love,
[C]Love, oh love, oh [G]careless love,
[G]Love, oh love, oh [E7]careless love,
[A7]See what careless love has [D7]done to [G]me.

Once I [G]wore my apron [G7]low,
[C]Once I wore my apron [G]low,
Once I [G]wore my apron [E7]low,
Couldn't [A7]keep you from my [D7]door, my [G]love.

Now I [G]wear my apron [G7]high,
[C]Now I wear my apron [G]high,
Now I [G]wear my apron [E7]high,
You'll [A7]see my door and pass on [D7]by, my [G]love.
songs.license: Public Domain (W.C. Handy arrangement 1921, traditional roots)

songs.title: Cocaine Blues
songs.lyrics:
[C]Early one morning while making my rounds,
I took a [F]shot of cocaine, and I shot my woman [C]down.
I went [G7]home and went to bed,
Stuck that [F]lovin' .44 beneath my [C]head.

[C]Got up next mornin' and I grabbed that gun,
Took a [F]shot of cocaine and away I [C]run,
Made a [G7]good run but I run too slow,
They over[F]took me down in Juarez Mex[C]ico.

songs.title: Make Me a Pallet on the Floor
songs.lyrics:
[C]Make me a pallet on your [C7]floor,
[F]Make me a pallet on your [C]floor,
[C]Make it soft, make it low,
[D7]So my good gal will never [G7]know,
[C]Make me a pallet on your [G7]floor.

I'm [C]coming home, baby, on [C7]Christmas Day,
[F]Coming home, baby, on Christmas [C]Day,
[C]Coming home, baby, on Christmas Day,
[D7]Then we'll laugh and dance and [G7]play,
[C]Make me a pallet on your [G7]floor.

songs.title: C.C. Rider (See See Rider)
songs.lyrics:
[C]See see rider, see what you have [F]done,
[C]See see rider, see what you have [F]done,
[C]Made me love you, [G7]now your gal has [C]come.

[C]I'm goin' away baby, won't be back till [F]fall,
[C]Goin' away baby, won't be back till [F]fall,
[C]If I find me a good gal, [G7]I won't be back at [C]all.

[C]Buy me a pistol, just as long as [F]I am tall,
[C]Gonna buy me a pistol, just as long as [F]I am tall,
[C]Gonna shoot my baby, [G7]just to see her [C]fall.
